_doc: Redirect stubs for retired/duplicate intents. Each listed slug MUST stay a redirect stub (meta-refresh + canonical + noindex,follow) pointing at its canonical owner. DO NOT regenerate retired slugs as full pages. dogemergency.org is built canonical-owners-only, so this starts EMPTY by design — the rail exists from day one so we NEVER repeat the cat/rabbit -emergency-signs cannibalization cleanup. If you ever retire an intent, add it here and the guard will enforce it.
